data.description:
Elevate your home baking with this versatile 6-cavity hamburger bun mould. Designed for consistent, professional-looking buns, it solves the common problem of uneven shaping and inconsistent sizing, ensuring your homemade burgers look as good as they taste. This reusable baking pan is a must-have for any kitchen enthusiast.

Create perfect buns every time with our simple guide. First, lightly grease or flour the cavities. Next, portion your dough evenly into each hollow cavity. The design promotes optimal air circulation during baking, ensuring a crispy exterior while keeping the inside soft and tender—solving the issue of dense or soggy buns. After baking, the flexible silicone allows for easy release and quick cleanup.

Key Specifications:
• Material: Food-Grade Silicone
• Color: Black
• Overall Size: 34.5 x 23.5 x 4 cm / 13.58 x 9.25 x 1.57 inches
• Single Cavity Diameter: 10 cm / 3.94 inches
• Temperature Range: -40°F to +446°F (-40°C to +230°C)
• Feature: Foldable for compact storage

Package Includes:
1 x Hamburger Bun Mould

Important Notes:
Due to manual measurement, please allow a slight size tolerance of 0-1 cm / 0-0.39 inches.
Colors may appear slightly different on various screens due to monitor display variations.
data.title: 6-Cavity Silicone Hamburger Bun Mold – Foldable Baking Pan for Homemade Buns, Oven & Microwave Safe, -40°F to +446°F Heat Resistant
sellingPoints: Wide Temperature Range: Our mould withstands from minus forty degrees Fahrenheit to over four hundred forty six degrees Fahrenheit for versatile baking in ovens and freezers
Flexible Silicone Material: Crafted from durable and safe silicone that is easy to fold for compact storage in any kitchen drawer or cabinet
Hollow Cavity Design: Features six individual hollow cavities to promote even airflow for buns with a crispy exterior and a soft tender interior
Effortless Cleanup: The non-stick surface allows for easy food release and is dishwasher safe for simple and quick cleaning
Complete Package: Your purchase includes one six cavity hamburger bun mould measuring approximately thirty four point five by twenty three point five by four centimeters
